query:
SELECT id, away_team, home_team, game_time, 
       book_away_spread, book_home_spread, book_total, book_away_ml, book_home_ml,
       published_model
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' 
  AND game_time >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2026-03-22 00:00:00') * 1000
  AND game_time < UNIX_TIMESTAMP('2026-03-23 12:00:00') * 1000
ORDER BY game_time ASC
LIMIT 20;
